name: Ningxia Baofeng Energy Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningxia Baofeng Energy Group Co., Ltd. produces and sells coal chemicals which includes tar, thiamine, and benzol. The company also mines and produces coal products and other chemical products, which include methanol and olefin. It offers real estate sales. Ningxia Baofeng Energy Group Co., Ltd. was formerly known as Ningxia Baofeng Energy Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ningxia Baofeng Energy Group Co., Ltd. in January 2014. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Yinchuan, China.
